CustomField.description: 1. We are using this field in MR Reconciliation Studio Component. 2. Calculation- 2.1 When generating MR reconciliation type of utilization, we are creating or updating FH:FC ratio records. 2.2 We are updating new FH:FC ratio value on this Supplement Rent field based on below conditions - 2.2.1 if old and new ratio percentage is not blank and greater than reconcilation schedule record's Ratio Variance (%) field. 2.2.2 And Actual Utlization record is not present for that month
CustomField.label: _Avg FHFC Ratio
